note: Curated contract for the components injected into kind:'react' page source. Reference these by their PascalCase `tag` in JSX. `data` props mirror the objectui registry `inputs` (the same surface the html tier validates); `controlled` props are React-driven state (recordId, mode, filters…); `callback` props are React functions the component invokes. Layout is plain HTML + Tailwind — these blocks are for DATA. Filters use the ObjectQL array form: [field, op, value], e.g. ['status','=','active'] (ops: =, !=, >, <, contains, in). Live data: `const adapter = useAdapter(); await adapter.find(obj, {$filter, $top}); .findOne; .create; .update`.

blocks.summary: Server-connected create / edit / view form for one object. Auto-builds fields from the object schema. Built-in drawer/modal variants via formType.

props.name: objectName
props.description: The object whose record this form edits.

props.name: mode
props.description: Create a new record, edit/view an existing one.

props.name: recordId
props.description: Which record to load (edit/view mode). Drive from React state for master/detail.

props.name: fields
props.description: Limit/order the fields shown (defaults to the object's form fields).

props.name: formType
props.description: Form presentation; 'drawer'/'modal' render the form in a built-in overlay (use drawerSide/drawerWidth/modalSize).

props.name: onSuccess
props.description: Called after a successful create/update with the saved record. Typical: close a panel + bump a reload key.

props.name: submitHandler
props.description: Custom persistence instead of the default create/update (the form just validates and hands over values).

props.name: navigateOnSuccess
props.description: URL to navigate to after save (supports {id}).

blocks.summary: Server-connected object table with toolbar (search/filter/sort), and switchable views (grid/kanban/gallery/calendar/timeline/gantt/map). The primary object-list block.

props.name: filters
props.description: ObjectQL filter, e.g. ['status','=','active'] or ['and', [...], [...]]. Drive from React state for tabbed/searched lists.

props.name: viewType
props.description: Which view to render (default grid). This is how you get a kanban/calendar/gantt of the object.

props.name: navigation
props.description: What a row click does. Set { mode: 'none' } when you handle clicks yourself via onRowClick.

props.name: onRowClick
props.description: Called with the clicked row's record. The hook for master/detail.

blocks.summary: Lower-level data grid for an object (columns + filters). Prefer ListView for a full toolbar; use ObjectGrid for an embedded table.
Parent record + child line-items, edited and saved atomically (e.g. Invoice + line items).

props.name: mode
props.description: Create or edit the parent + children.

props.name: relationshipField
props.description: Field on the child that points to the parent.

props.name: totalField
props.description: Parent field that rolls up the child amounts.

blocks.summary: Chart over an object's aggregated data (bar/line/area/pie/donut/…).

props.name: aggregate
props.description: Aggregation: function (sum/avg/count) over field, grouped by groupBy.

props.name: filter
props.description: ObjectQL filter to scope the data.

blocks.summary: Escape hatch — render any registered component by type when it isn't injected as a named block.

alsoAvailable.note: Other curated public blocks are reachable too. Kanban/calendar/gantt/timeline/map of an object = <ListView viewType="kanban" …>. Metrics/dashboards/pivots and record:* panels can be rendered via <Block type="object-metric" …> / <Block type="dashboard" …> until they are added to this contract.
